description: MCP servers for AgentSkin and Tokenjuice integration with MOA agents. Both servers expose token optimization tools that can be called by any MOA agent with MCP support. Paths are auto-resolved by wrapper scripts in .agents/mcp/ — no manual path editing needed.

agentskin-mcp.description: AgentSkin SSS v2.0 — exposes fetch_optimized_data (URL→optimized skin, up to 88% token reduction with auto-classification for GitHub, npm, HackerNews, weather, etc.) and skin_reasoning (LLM-to-LLM text noise removal).

tokenjuice-mcp.description: Tokenjuice v0.8.0 — exposes 5 tools: apply_json_semantic (JSON pruning), classify_url (URL rule matching), strip_ansi (5-pattern ANSI stripping), estimate_tokens (grapheme-aware token estimation), reduce (full pipeline on command output).
